context.audience: Developer tool founders growing organic traffic, marketing engineers building link acquisition systems, indie hackers creating link-worthy content assets
pain_points: Building backlinks to developer-focused content without spammy outreach tactics
Creating link-worthy assets like tools, calculators, and datasets that attract natural links
Measuring link building ROI and prioritizing efforts that move domain authority
Building relationships in developer communities for organic link opportunities
Scaling link building efforts without sacrificing quality or reputation
content_that_works: Case studies of successful link campaigns
subtopics: Open-source as a link building strategy
